title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: Alberta Tech ran an experiment comparing Claude Code's job performance against a human developer, documenting where the AI succeeded and failed. The video explores the workflow mechanics and results, raising questions about AI-driven job displacement.
